name: Senator Braun
subject: this is important
body:
What is on the line No images? [Click here](https://mbfi.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xhddrdy-vkreeut-j/) There are two Senate races on January 5th that will determine who has the majority in the US Senate. If the Democrats win, Schumer And Pelosi will have control. Bernie Sanders will run the Senate Budget Committee. Democrats in the Senate will hold hearing after hearing to destroy President Trump, drag his administration through the mud, and roll back all the progress we made. We can not allow this to happen. That's why at this crucial time, I'm devoting a significant amount of my time to helping my Republican colleagues Senator Perdue and Senator Loeffler win. We need a conservative majority as firewall in the US Senate. I hope you will join me in supporting this important effort. [Contribute Today](https://mbfi.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhddrdy-vkreeut-r/) Contribute today and your contribution will go straight to Georgia to get this done.Let's win this for America.Senator Mike Braun [Win Georgia, Save America](https://mbfi.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhddrdy-vkreeut-y/) MIKE BRAUN FOR INDIANA
PO BOX 159
ZIONSVILLE, IN 460777 [Unsubscribe](https://mbfi.cmail20.com/t/t-u-xhddrdy-vkreeut-t/)
---

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: NEW DETAILS: WARNOCK'S TIES TO SUSPECTED CHILD ABUSE DEEPER THAN ORIGINALLY KNOWN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2020 NEW DETAILS: WARNOCK'S TIES TO SUSPECTED CHILD ABUSE DEEPER THAN ORIGINALLY KNOWN
ATLANTA - Shocking new evidence obtained by the Washington Free Beacon [reveals](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nnO1zO5sQar8qqlZVsq0l-uWvR57d8SKF_G2LavFIkxdBaKEazny2LNlh4POj9ZjXX-3fx71_IHqMo7ausoxZNNBhQxmEqQ4h5ah7kWG-BBvTYAVBftjzOcWEdnU7HjrsL_mYUNse-_sqOXTg7k0HlkJoHRNx0wpdRzHrtKu8HWztuMKEAFhSEoAQqbA04ej5dQiyCflGiqOQt3SZT4NJaooUaEXxvJtnrPGzA_3IWpYk3UFPqe0OX3z-2M1BINxeJJ5w1KAHOB3JvWeM7Xs1id_-9Tq4qMa&c=oB_EZxzrfd9iX-7WQZvS5FeCn1WLRubxd055dVH9sSKCT814TSKnOA==&ch=_Tw4oGk24BNr8gtxAEiPP0bV-u_4kN0kdtKjnBs2qgoVo64XOWxmqw==) new details about child abuse and other disturbing incidents that occurred at a summer camp run by Raphael Warnock in the early 2000's. According to [documents obtained](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nnO1zO5sQar8qqlZVsq0l-uWvR57d8SKF_G2LavFIkxdBaKEazny2LNlh4POj9Zj465iPUy0VnHBvKIGcF1oi-LGm2-fPddewpcn2PIdsdNQ205Sz1zd6G2rj0-r3__1b7f4uSqBHumgfw_Otn6k7jAv7A0Jw7vPEUVGESLcRo9bsnTM_XVEXzVXW7noyV3uFt7yFRZGq9kD6TrFHBCUITfMftTPRSBZD5Wze-n22r8=&c=oB_EZxzrfd9iX-7WQZvS5FeCn1WLRubxd055dVH9sSKCT814TSKnOA==&ch=_Tw4oGk24BNr8gtxAEiPP0bV-u_4kN0kdtKjnBs2qgoVo64XOWxmqw==) by the Washington Free Beacon, Camp Farthest Out had been cited multiple times by state officials for unreported child abuse allegations and safety-code violations. As the Beacon summarizes, "The records, from the Maryland Department of Health and Mental Hygiene, paint a picture of an environment where campers were routinely left unsupervised, staffers were not subject to required criminal background checks, and at least five cases of child abuse or neglect were brought against the camp's director, who was ultimately forced to resign."
This comes as other questions linger regarding Warnock's involvement with Camp Farthest Out. As first [reported](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nnO1zO5sQar8qqlZVsq0l-uWvR57d8SKF_G2LavFIkxdBaKEazny2NyleJTyCtbjt3FBjWjv7U-RQl9wcTfhuXKibzy-Ryh12HKZcsJaFV5j4zYmjeBFGFZ3zq7oiN9jazyh_F34zpj_FCzswjvFEvy7OW38ud7kUd4d3dOBNxhLrwQ6QOIMgjOPHizkvle2wiDNPojZCxoKMQMt7--UNw==&c=oB_EZxzrfd9iX-7WQZvS5FeCn1WLRubxd055dVH9sSKCT814TSKnOA==&ch=_Tw4oGk24BNr8gtxAEiPP0bV-u_4kN0kdtKjnBs2qgoVo64XOWxmqw==) by the Baltimore Sun, Raphael Warnock was arrested in 2002 for obstructing a police investigation into suspected child abuse that occurred under his leadership. Warnock was a senior pastor at the Douglas Memorial Community Church in Baltimore, which was running Camp Farthest Out where there was suspected child abuse occurring. When police attempted to investigate the allegations, Warnock and Mark Andre Wainwright, another pastor at the church, obstructed their investigation - and later tried to prevent a camper from talking to the police. Arresting officers from the Child and Sexual Assault Unit had "never encountered resistance like [Warnock's] at all."
Worse still, a civil lawsuit in the Circuit Court for Baltimore City was filed against both Warnock and Wainwright, as well as Douglas Memorial Community Church of Baltimore, Camp Farthest Out, Corey Willis Ferguson, and two other individuals. The civil suit appears to have been settled in 2005, which is incidentally the same year Warnock left Douglas Memorial Church for Ebenezer Baptist Church. This civil lawsuit raises additional red flags about Warnock's involvement in the child abuse investigation.
Additionally, a crucial detail lies with Warnock's co-defendant in the case, Corey Ferguson. On Aug. 29, 2002, just three weeks after Warnock's arrest for obstructing an investigation into alleged child abuse, Ferguson was arrested and charged with second-degree assault.
These new details reveal that this situation is much deeper than originally known, and it leaves simple questions that Warnock needs to be asked:

* Why were the police called to investigate child abuse in the first place?
* What was Warnock's knowledge or involvement - if any?
* Was Warnock aware of the church's documented history of child abuse and health code violations?
* Who exactly is Corey Ferguson? How are Warnock and Ferguson connected?
* What does Ferguson's arrest for assault say about Warnock's knowledge of suspected abuse (especially given the timeline)?
* Was this suit settled? If so, why? Under what terms?
* Why were Warnock, Wainwright, and Ferguson personally all listed as co-defendants?

Warnock has [refused](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nnO1zO5sQar8qqlZVsq0l-uWvR57d8SKF_G2LavFIkxdBaKEazny2LNlh4POj9Zje-Axy4DpG0_pSS_7Qryg_3yE_IbAQheHVKsH3nlosCEqP4nbRteIYoPEGQcMDn7Kb4t6wX8OCNtX2WGQjKMPzKGK2Rq7S152Ba2GL8fjDflXVJ9_BecrdzkLnEB3cK-X&c=oB_EZxzrfd9iX-7WQZvS5FeCn1WLRubxd055dVH9sSKCT814TSKnOA==&ch=_Tw4oGk24BNr8gtxAEiPP0bV-u_4kN0kdtKjnBs2qgoVo64XOWxmqw==) to answer any questions about what happened during his years supervising Camp Farthest Out - even when he was directly asked to explain the situation in last week's debate.
---
| BACKGROUND:
The below image shows the civil case information from the Maryland Judiciary Case Search online database.

* Anthony Kevin Washington, et al vs Camp Farthest Out Inc, et al, Case #24C03009106, Case Information, Maryland Judiciary Case Search

---
|
---
| Multiple parties were named as defendants in this civil case, including Camp Farthest Out, Douglas Memorial Community Church, Ferguson, Wainwright, and Warnock
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| The below image shows the civil case was dismissed. (Maryland Judiciary Case Search online database)
---
|
---
| The below image shows the Case Search information naming Corey Ferguson as a defendant in the assault case and lists the charge of second-degree assault.

* State of MD vs Ferguson, Corey Willis, Case #5S00024904, Case Information & Defendant Information, Maryland Judiciary Case Search

---
|
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nnO1zO5sQar8qqlZVsq0l-uWvR57d8SKF_G2LavFIkxdBaKEazny2GoBubXnNODnw4X8KmoURQeLDvzEgTu7eFLqM4DcozkqIx3notwr0ExCXYFBACLqG5EcZ2_i5tfrxWXQZlTft2mJ5nmWpUZ8gHFeUYCKEbtw&c=oB_EZxzrfd9iX-7WQZvS5FeCn1WLRubxd055dVH9sSKCT814TSKnOA==&ch=_Tw4oGk24BNr8gtxAEiPP0bV-u_4kN0kdtKjnBs2qgoVo64XOWxmqw==)

subject: Common Defense supported Doyle. Now, we need your help.
body:
We were tired of Trump and the corrupt GOP exploiting veterans as their political props and claiming to speak for us when they pass divisive and destructive policies. So we got organized. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKIWPcJl1fRqgCa2JPTEKaIB-gW2divyXMsvnN-l96-tDpZutcKIsCMnH4dAp0OI3e9aYa2BGDjJQc4HojGKA20jkzNoeco1HS59zd6VgQMGyeK3r6eGcbTAMh29mndLerum3i1MgKmOOAJ1YoiGVLQxS-ShPDK34XmOEXQsCEHlLOaOqbskufzBOtRXGupeYvazBMtvBrOLzPVf8Rh5xBYYTREki4ISYwrMFLTliqiHXEgOwos8k8dCjGQYajhbWf-DVV-9PXH77s80HN3U6yVZyiVZ9YzE_Wew8NLf5cZ9qj_0Je5aSiAwDHPy0IwmjA/37m/geozb2XuR-KBB2OPI6GWNQ/h0/991qjzVxTBoww8xwUuIpttUSYTAVpioQn9HVZAAZvjs)

Hi Friend, my name is Steve Kiernan and I'm a Common Defense veteran and former volunteer for Doyle Canning's campaign.
---
|
---
In her run for Congress, Doyle earned the endorsement of Common Defense, the largest grassroots group of progressive veterans in the country. Common Defense was proud to support Doyle because of the future that we saw in her. Now, we need your help as we fight for the future of our country. For the past four years, Common Defense veterans have been organizing veterans to vote out Donald Trump. We were tired of Trump and the corrupt GOP exploiting veterans as their political props and claiming to speak for us when they pass divisive and destructive policies. So we got organized. We built a sustainable movement of progressive veterans, by building community and developing leadership among fellow veterans around the country. And our work paid off: this year, veterans swung from President Trump by over 16 percent from 2016. But even though we've ended Donald Trump's presidency, we need to keep our momentum going. Now, Common Defense needs your support as we prepare to fight for change in Oregon and across the US by ensuring the peaceful transition of power and getting the new administration to make good on the pledge to End Forever War. With your help, we can [organize and mobilize veterans](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQuGLlp4qfSYQMITLILbkuhj_ocP9nlzY8BvHjbIuVTao6VntEE7ahd5kkQwc9mx_oRVgEqg1vfestiZ56TRhGLJ9y2P-RPnhQYYiweRSbXCaOH7MxQHT1Ql8gvABKfIFBS-FAvLLHq_ysBAi9Qu9VRgFFW4eZ5lVxanDoer4JW1X1ykHTiEcloyPXD6isrhOAWm0Ysbiqkns_w2sTF2xoNxle42CB7VOF9guspAvkBwmeseVFBtwxh13OioIyIuL0CAbIXPCGRHrYVtYiWUZpyrj-oYm08zb5-g7RAQqdY6-8-Xc3AWeWZIwBiyvP2PI-g/37m/geozb2XuR-KBB2OPI6GWNQ/h6/ozGN7IfsaN_mFySzuTxuWOUg--6GJBf9ETHx3xjz4LE) to be the force that changes our country for good. But our work is far from over. We need to continue to build our sustainable progressive movement going forward through training, organizing and leadership development. With your help, we can continue to train veterans to take political power back for themselves, for working class Americans, and for all those taken advantage of by the one percent. clean_body: We were tired of Trump and the corrupt GOP exploiting veterans as their political props and claiming to speak for us when they pass divisive and destructive policies. So we got organized. | | Hi Friend, my name is Steve Kiernan and I'm a Common Defense veteran and former volunteer for Doyle Canning's campaign. | In her run for Congress, Doyle earned the endorsement of Common Defense, the largest grassroots group of progressive veterans in the country. Common Defense was proud to support Doyle because of the future that we saw in her. Now, we need your help as we fight for the future of our country. For the past four years, Common Defense veterans have been organizing veterans to vote out Donald Trump. We were tired of Trump and the corrupt GOP exploiting veterans as their political props and claiming to speak for us when they pass divisive and destructive policies. So we got organized. We built a sustainable movement of progressive veterans, by building community and developing leadership among fellow veterans around the country. And our work paid off: this year, veterans swung from President Trump by over 16 percent from 2016. But even though we've ended Donald Trump's presidency, we need to keep our momentum going. Now, Common Defense needs your support as we prepare to fight for change in Oregon and across the US by ensuring the peaceful transition of power and getting the new administration to make good on the pledge to End Forever War. Friend as we continue to organize to End the Forever War? | Friend we've proven time and time again that a group of veterans, no matter how big or small, can make a difference. With your help, we can to be the force that changes our country for good. But our work is far from over. We need to continue to build our sustainable progressive movement going forward through training, organizing and leadership development. With your help, we can continue to train veterans to take political power back for themselves, for working class Americans, and for all those taken advantage of by the one percent. So please, if you can, will you to End the Forever War? In solidarity, Steven Kiernan Common Defense, Eugene Oregon P.S. join me and get involved. | | | Sent via . | Friend,
Kelly Loeffler will be hitting the road next week for several more stops on her statewide Senate Firewall Tour - and she would love to see you there! You, your friends, and your family are all invited to come out and join Senator Loeffler (and special guests!) for these free rallies ahead of the January 5th runoff.

name: David Perdue
subject: Who is Jon Ossoff?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Senate
body:
The stakes in this runoff election could not be higher, and today I want to introduce you to my radical opponent, Jon Ossoff.
Friend,

The stakes in this runoff election could not be higher, and today I want to introduce you to my radical opponent, Jon Ossoff.

Let's look at the facts:
* **He is nothing but a puppet of the Left.** Jon Ossoff is a 33-year old wannabe career politician with no real-world accomplishments. He is a vehicle for the extreme left to advance their toxic agenda.
* **He is incredibly radical.** He is supported by Communist Party U.S.A., has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders, and previously engaged in business with a media company partly owned by the Chinese Communist government and then tried to hide it from the people of Georgia.
* **He is an economic nightmare.** He opposed Republican tax cuts and instead supports a plan that will drastically raise taxes. He opposed the Paycheck Protection Program that saved 1.5 million Georgia jobs, even though his own father used a loan to save his company.
* **He supports the defund the police movement.** In an interview with WAOK, Ossoff said that "funding has to be on the line" for police departments- the very definition of defunding the police. He also refused to sign the pledge to support law enforcement.
* **He doesn 't actually care about Georgia.** He has offered Georgia's agricultural community NOTHING in terms of policy, assistance, or even attention. He supports a radical healthcare system. His public option means that 40+ rural Georgia hospitals could close.

[**Georgia deserves better than Jon Ossoff, and today I need to ask you to rush an emergency contribution to guarantee that he NEVER represents our great state**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ne7dOVZc_pPX88ZFB6jyLLCvLvXyYj42pTDDbZIvM0LPm0zKLYA-55NivzMJ2ierBNAT4oWPD8NgaiyA2fYnNwarTvgit6IkY2JqBwxJDVRklA5cWuIVnX2yDwFnbqn1klmB_ypPJonCrt_4vlmdeVTAyMU0ul-iWSVpoQVaN23iF_wbWQiRFsQqCtFCRhTI5ms9GFIvFCElytbrd21VrGCHm0Me5CleU7CxhWf7Wd3cB8_iSN33i-yBwfrK9jDlB8zMhbrXgpSoerhSwZHlnDpdSlgMZ9P7A2g64-tElrPxIGtq2kWfeyDH525zPLWhc9HuS6qoexNMWINpZPLY-TD_vRcVdqIpQcbFDyEVOS7Pm2-c7cH15kqoTUqOXOU1Bcf5WZHpIIDIi_Cjji6Mvx-QmvJTFz-g&c=dNewLUkg5ts6O28uTK8Gxwcn5yZLMzR7ZNb_HBeP8VEFrDYBqmpzOA==&ch=UwmHCTy7X8Xcdi_ASp36Yly2n80G7xYcQTzNFLrasDuEeTUzuobNVw==)

name: Kelly Loeffler
subject: What can we do?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
Our initial Stand with Kelly Loeffler Petition received such great feedback that we are opening it up again.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irMV5dl_QIwpnpobwdkvNGcXb29OcA8ZUBJ2VsmqFcVa9rBWoGIwWfMH4_78fVSyDBr9M0eEDxuJ5RNNTaEoCn3nIlvXWeTtL4NPUUI3qejw1x1DkWC9Yt-m6AhUlrzz5ueNr40RdRQ4kzgVsqRVg8zl_6v0YcsGHeCYVz97Ju4vC38NjHr0eUX4jcvrIhImHJilJ23lcC2JmMl8ENX_Pd49iQGGKHHAf21qCklJk6fquSKjzf-2IsuXFtaG-i_Q5TXqBBwIK8xyfMBsJFuK_-FryuAanlij5ScN9CNkCdZL-6laiBQmJxqxwv7t21eevyjqpXOqQRpqHctX3ku_9lgouOfjOnLnJUTsfrggctOYyntsSn5uJi3A3DqlnFSvOrcUxDOa7trqC4mHmJpB36c52UefvX0Ind29dXx07o4=&c=l_DfJzDJczX2LL0v-8rj1E8U4SJa7LcqZojF_UHsmT-RoIrzwOzq5A==&ch=RuuZomWd_ndYkJbmpiURLaI6T1Amz0_I-IpZcouZ5BnF05VVLywdYA==)
Friend,

The Democrats are using every trick in the book to take the Georgia Senate seats from us. The liberal media is on their side and is doing everything they can to amplify the Democrats message and keep conservatives down.

**But we 're not out of this race by a long shot.**

Here is what we can do to win this race:

● _We need all conservatives to stand together

● Boost our message and fight back against the liberal mainstream media

● [**Chip into our campaign**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irMV5dl_QIwpnpobwdkvNGcXb29OcA8ZUBJ2VsmqFcVa9rBWoGIwWfMH4_78fVSyDBr9M0eEDxuJ5RNNTaEoCn3nIlvXWeTtL4NPUUI3qejw1x1DkWC9Yt-m6AhUlrzz5ueNr40RdRQ4kzgVsqRVg8zl_6v0YcsGHeCYVz97Ju4vC38NjHr0eUX4jcvrIhImHJilJ23lcC2JmMl8ENX_Pd49iQGGKHHAf21qCklJk6fquSKjzf-2IsuXFtaG-i_Q5TXqBBwIK8xyfMBsJFuK_-FryuAanlij5ScN9CNkCdZL-6laiBQmJxqxwv7t21eevyjqpXOqQRpqHctX3ku_9lgouOfjOnLnJUTsfrggctOYyntsSn5uJi3A3DqlnFSvOrcUxDOa7trqC4mHmJpB36c52UefvX0Ind29dXx07o4=&c=l_DfJzDJczX2LL0v-8rj1E8U4SJa7LcqZojF_UHsmT-RoIrzwOzq5A==&ch=RuuZomWd_ndYkJbmpiURLaI6T1Amz0_I-IpZcouZ5BnF05VVLywdYA==) so we can keep reaching out to patriots like you_

If we can accomplish these things, the Democrats don't stand a chance on January 5th. We don't need special interests from New York and California to back our campaign, we just need real people fighting for our cause.
[HELP SAVE THE SENATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irMV5dl_QIwpnpobwdkvNGcXb29OcA8ZUBJ2VsmqFcVa9rBWoGIwWfMH4_78fVSyDBr9M0eEDxuJ5RNNTaEoCn3nIlvXWeTtL4NPUUI3qejw1x1DkWC9Yt-m6AhUlrzz5ueNr40RdRQ4kzgVsqRVg8zl_6v0YcsGHeCYVz97Ju4vC38NjHr0eUX4jcvrIhImHJilJ23lcC2JmMl8ENX_Pd49iQGGKHHAf21qCklJk6fquSKjzf-2IsuXFtaG-i_Q5TXqBBwIK8xyfMBsJFuK_-FryuAanlij5ScN9CNkCdZL-6laiBQmJxqxwv7t21eevyjqpXOqQRpqHctX3ku_9lgouOfjOnLnJUTsfrggctOYyntsSn5uJi3A3DqlnFSvOrcUxDOa7trqC4mHmJpB36c52UefvX0Ind29dXx07o4=&c=l_DfJzDJczX2LL0v-8rj1E8U4SJa7LcqZojF_UHsmT-RoIrzwOzq5A==&ch=RuuZomWd_ndYkJbmpiURLaI6T1Amz0_I-IpZcouZ5BnF05VVLywdYA==)
---

There is no better time than right now to get involved and help us fight back. With only a few weeks to go until the election, we need all hands-on deck if we want to save America from the radical left taking full control.

I look forward to your continued efforts and support in this critical battle.

Thank you,

Kelly Loeffler

[FIGHT BACK](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irMV5dl_QIwpnpobwdkvNGcXb29OcA8ZUBJ2VsmqFcVa9rBWoGIwWfMH4_78fVSyDBr9M0eEDxuJ5RNNTaEoCn3nIlvXWeTtL4NPUUI3qejw1x1DkWC9Yt-m6AhUlrzz5ueNr40RdRQ4kzgVsqRVg8zl_6v0YcsGHeCYVz97Ju4vC38NjHr0eUX4jcvrIhImHJilJ23lcC2JmMl8ENX_Pd49iQGGKHHAf21qCklJk6fquSKjzf-2IsuXFtaG-i_Q5TXqBBwIK8xyfMBsJFuK_-FryuAanlij5ScN9CNkCdZL-6laiBQmJxqxwv7t21eevyjqpXOqQRpqHctX3ku_9lgouOfjOnLnJUTsfrggctOYyntsSn5uJi3A3DqlnFSvOrcUxDOa7trqC4mHmJpB36c52UefvX0Ind29dXx07o4=&c=l_DfJzDJczX2LL0v-8rj1E8U4SJa7LcqZojF_UHsmT-RoIrzwOzq5A==&ch=RuuZomWd_ndYkJbmpiURLaI6T1Amz0_I-IpZcouZ5BnF05VVLywdYA==)

With only a few weeks to go until the election, we need all hands-on deck if we want to save America from the radical left taking full control. I look forward to your continued efforts and support in this critical battle. Thank you, Kelly Loeffler == Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler The maximum allowable contribution per individual to Georgians for Kelly Loeffler is $5,600 ($2,800 for the general and $2,800 designated for a potential general run-off election). clean_body: Americans, divided along ideological and cultural lines following the still-contested presidential election, are at a dangerous fork in the road, according to conservative radio host Rush Limbaugh. | | Finally, the establishment media has begun covering the allegations of illegal activity and illicit business dealings on the part of the Biden family. It only took them until after all 50 states had certified their election results, which became official on Tuesday after Hawaii became the last state to do so. | Colorado Republican Rep-elect Lauren Boebert has vowed to be a counterweight to the progressive “Squad” in the House of Representatives. | YouTube announced Wednesday it will ban content questioning the outcome of this year’s presidential election. The video platform said in a blog post that it will now start removing content “alleging that widespread fraud or errors changed the outcome of the 2020 U.S. Presidential election.” | If Joe Biden gets installed in the White House in January, he plans to impose a mask mandate during his first 100 days and will push a “mass vaccination plan” despite concerns over its long-term safety. | You may remember Atilis Gym, a workout spot in Camden County, New Jersey, that has made headlines over the past few months due to owners Ian Smith and Frank Trumbetti’s refusal to comply with the government’s coronavirus orders. | The former Navy SEAL was taking no prisoners. In the two years since he was first elected to Congress, Texas Rep. Dan Crenshaw has established a reputation as one of the Republican Party’s most outspoken opponents of Democratic power games. | He may be bloodied, but he’s unbowed. With every passing day bringing closer the possibility that former Vice President Joe Biden will be sworn in as president in January, President Donald Trump told a White House crowd on Wednesday he can still win the 2020 election. | Joe Biden’s nominee to lead the Department of Housing and Urban Development is Democratic Rep. Marcia Fudge of Ohio, who once praised a domestic abuser who later pled guilty to stabbing his ex-wife to death. | |

subject: We’re in the final stretch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
A lot of Democrats might be celebrating, but the fight is FAR from over. The radical Left is STILL angry. They're mobilizing fast and raising more from their liberal megadonors than ever before as a last attempt to win Georgia's critical runoff elections and flip the Senate.
Friend,

A lot of Democrats might be celebrating, but the fight is FAR from over.

**The radical Left is STILL angry. They 're mobilizing _fast_ and raising more from their liberal megadonors than _ever before_ as a last attempt to win Georgia's critical runoff elections and flip the Senate.**

**Senate Republicans need an immediate surge before their upcoming****[mid-month fundraising deadline.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K33eOpfKFZD_gU75rn1zFbFRoCqyyLD_dEMfTxK6__qF60pTgWMLP4GJv__cYoFx7An0VXmsHyFjs5SX6DMg7QW0ovYYjcZaBsScAbXeoCx1TqXKkwknGiPbelT4rRC3SBp4vPN4RZnXaaI5eYxvriaJFDaafy8ggVkJsDmWJTzUUjyd-faskE_dDS9SXv3J4oD63I69SPZUhPG8johxR_HqKoZuXIeL25gImpRmPs_XqhesgJ2RIC738TlsZvtC91_y267kCCkUPgAK9Fn9IWDyOMdkJjA6MO7a5NXnXyHEdWI2xC3CIhAciIv5tYaaFIXxBEGGbjQh06WRfjQMTHaZjhzs6X0hbZEUAmbMtIhPzs8lMp5iT0T-rk_zxjQDidiYJbO5nao6ZdfjeN_fMobiBSy46ou-&c=-ECml-m9inCbZLGJSepehNhTHmYia7ipG2NglT_PrVr2pWnMB3tE2A==&ch=-OB7RNcis7MpHOS7wM2m0o85rmY_zymH-thHDNWji2t9471nQxbQ-Q==)** You've been there for us before, and I need you to take action again. [**Rush a 6X-MATCHED donation before 11:59 PM tonight to stop a liberal takeover.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K33eOpfKFZD_gU75rn1zFbFRoCqyyLD_dEMfTxK6__qF60pTgWMLP4GJv__cYoFx7An0VXmsHyFjs5SX6DMg7QW0ovYYjcZaBsScAbXeoCx1TqXKkwknGiPbelT4rRC3SBp4vPN4RZnXaaI5eYxvriaJFDaafy8ggVkJsDmWJTzUUjyd-faskE_dDS9SXv3J4oD63I69SPZUhPG8johxR_HqKoZuXIeL25gImpRmPs_XqhesgJ2RIC738TlsZvtC91_y267kCCkUPgAK9Fn9IWDyOMdkJjA6MO7a5NXnXyHEdWI2xC3CIhAciIv5tYaaFIXxBEGGbjQh06WRfjQMTHaZjhzs6X0hbZEUAmbMtIhPzs8lMp5iT0T-rk_zxjQDidiYJbO5nao6ZdfjeN_fMobiBSy46ou-&c=-ECml-m9inCbZLGJSepehNhTHmYia7ipG2NglT_PrVr2pWnMB3tE2A==&ch=-OB7RNcis7MpHOS7wM2m0o85rmY_zymH-thHDNWji2t9471nQxbQ-Q==)

Democrats only need these _**2 seats**_ to implement their extreme Socialist agenda. **Let me remind you what that means:**
* Disarming, dismantling, and defunding law enforcement
* Expanding and packing the Supreme Court with liberal activists
* Ending the tax cuts for middle class Americans
* ERASING EVERYTHING WE'VE ACCOMPLISHED

Failing to step up would be catastrophic for our chances of holding the Senate. We can't do this without you. [**Please, rush a contribution before the mid-month deadline to give Senate Republicans the necessary resources to secure Georgia for the conservative movement.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K33eOpfKFZD_gU75rn1zFbFRoCqyyLD_dEMfTxK6__qF60pTgWMLP4GJv__cYoFx7An0VXmsHyFjs5SX6DMg7QW0ovYYjcZaBsScAbXeoCx1TqXKkwknGiPbelT4rRC3SBp4vPN4RZnXaaI5eYxvriaJFDaafy8ggVkJsDmWJTzUUjyd-faskE_dDS9SXv3J4oD63I69SPZUhPG8johxR_HqKoZuXIeL25gImpRmPs_XqhesgJ2RIC738TlsZvtC91_y267kCCkUPgAK9Fn9IWDyOMdkJjA6MO7a5NXnXyHEdWI2xC3CIhAciIv5tYaaFIXxBEGGbjQh06WRfjQMTHaZjhzs6X0hbZEUAmbMtIhPzs8lMp5iT0T-rk_zxjQDidiYJbO5nao6ZdfjeN_fMobiBSy46ou-&c=-ECml-m9inCbZLGJSepehNhTHmYia7ipG2NglT_PrVr2pWnMB3tE2A==&ch=-OB7RNcis7MpHOS7wM2m0o85rmY_zymH-thHDNWji2t9471nQxbQ-Q==)

We're in the final stretch to determine who will hold the Senate, so any support you give today will go a long way in our fight! [**Make 6X THE IMPACT now, or we could lose the Majority!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K33eOpfKFZD_gU75rn1zFbFRoCqyyLD_dEMfTxK6__qF60pTgWMLP4GJv__cYoFx7An0VXmsHyFjs5SX6DMg7QW0ovYYjcZaBsScAbXeoCx1TqXKkwknGiPbelT4rRC3SBp4vPN4RZnXaaI5eYxvriaJFDaafy8ggVkJsDmWJTzUUjyd-faskE_dDS9SXv3J4oD63I69SPZUhPG8johxR_HqKoZuXIeL25gImpRmPs_XqhesgJ2RIC738TlsZvtC91_y267kCCkUPgAK9Fn9IWDyOMdkJjA6MO7a5NXnXyHEdWI2xC3CIhAciIv5tYaaFIXxBEGGbjQh06WRfjQMTHaZjhzs6X0hbZEUAmbMtIhPzs8lMp5iT0T-rk_zxjQDidiYJbO5nao6ZdfjeN_fMobiBSy46ou-&c=-ECml-m9inCbZLGJSepehNhTHmYia7ipG2NglT_PrVr2pWnMB3tE2A==&ch=-OB7RNcis7MpHOS7wM2m0o85rmY_zymH-thHDNWji2t9471nQxbQ-Q==)

Donald Trump Jr.

body:
Republicans are at risk.

************
**Here are the facts:**
In 2021, the once-in-a-decade process of legislative redistricting will occur. This process will determine the district boundaries for many elected offices, including the House of Representatives.
**Why this matters:**
Nancy Pelosi and her liberal allies are working overtime to gerrymander the maps in their favor. If they are able to succeed, it could all but guarantee a far-left Democratic House majority _**for the next ten years.**_

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eJgiWJUrFI92lgOuZlhLiz3eldgPkU3Aua2Xhr11bPKVycbkR4DQ1fYf1bnqKPAc4Xb3h7T5MepwNVFnfi_4TiJ2wVAg-vQurIfe12-9jS6mxPoTxj8JZdSOIl4eB4DZf2pgxMegXjE=&c=PVUi1YXaGPdmM1ZYp5rm_8rZVXghnJg6-MOEvDQ2Qha8JFDyhU--gA==&ch=xaLoNDAiwWe3S06Y6lwrS6Nco-lYYaI-Gp0awcWfe0NwglTKml4Vlg==).

name: Michelle Steel
subject: My accent is part of my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I discovered a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve and found a government failing the people who needed it most.

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-B6NbjUfd05eHTIl-h9GZ2gxS79Yg_crh_Zn-t3JEqmDPqAO_q9UQDmvobscFfaFCwr75iDUedTDsiYMx8OPzfwdN_Y6_Zsk13B8D39ISpLe4is4kQFAdC9PIQU1t9zEN6gLDm6szlfHcS0NFqPaMNWlJYBECmqQm0GoIRfIthhOF41tKPX8aFah8Jz0GX4Rw8QaZ32fgt5zyM02pwsWX4iMdI6mRl13FJYtHiT5KI0hrMsMsr7DN772yJqy2Rrw5_Hsw_guqhqoMDoYAQ9QGNNN8mtB3b6Qwn0-ug96bBRUh-rhCNNDtord7gVLTlRpYTNZg4N5iGTxu-kSX27YcukGDUedOGB7IKzN_RTJIDdwV_Er6KlZ5BZIjW4L7Y0byLBShnViYR1IzH09ED3vK_4gmBu0YCIHfbZgiU2XMJE=&c=rFdcz_4JXC66tHpls7dCPfJ-2_4tSCfjP8CN49t21P5z8o75Fl0NLg==&ch=Q9sjN8EZUqTJHho6XMmVSEcp_adGP2RvojU8_NVWASJGWQB-NR4a2g==)
**My accent is part of my story. **

I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity.

Instead, I discovered a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve and found a government failing the people who needed it most. **I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-busine****ss fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn 't have the resources to fight.**

_Friend, it was then I decided enough is enough._ I ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- the very agency that took advantage of my mother -- and won. Since then I have returned over $400 million to taxpayers, fought against higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. With a record of results, I will continue to fight for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet.

[**But I can 't do it alone.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-B6NbjUfd05eHTIl-h9GZ2gxS79Yg_crh_Zn-t3JEqmDPqAO_q9UQOfrX0BOEkM_5ydvDEiMjcRrTp5QSIO7wVnl8dIlZXQ2qx3vWEh_axvj36X2b3vDCsvsrkR5y5r-sxdUgFNuuHNDSb6CTz1R2T8p6VXxQkyg8l4jJ-kWBdv9ZFWV728DOeUwHxeZx5EPZENmZJHY71aCWLGdAbaNgZ3fBD_lqF74bvAwfe7jzbeJaJr_T-yjEpPtXq3Q215j8aSPMcVMPkdBuGOo8UOJUnr_MFXLvwJhM3e1PwhYMmGrCJHEBk-4kkO33U1LOgXmOOQJnT-okupRK8FH-HXno-UyPOAg9Wry7I5ITqE9TP-SIeZ0CKuFTZOOR1FIYSl70eWwRWGo--ZxAFgzAqIeqF8h3f7SSf-JtRdDymm9HFU=&c=rFdcz_4JXC66tHpls7dCPfJ-2_4tSCfjP8CN49t21P5z8o75Fl0NLg==&ch=Q9sjN8EZUqTJHho6XMmVSEcp_adGP2RvojU8_NVWASJGWQB-NR4a2g==)

The Democrats spent $11,000,000.00 to defeat us -- _spending more dark money against us than any other race in the nation!_ -- and outspent us 3:1. Cook Political rated this seat as "Lean D" and the Left spent millions on ads that distorted the truth and intentionally misled voters. One week after Election Day, we defeated Pelosi's handpicked candidate by just a couple thousand votes and flipped a California seat from BLUE to RED.

**And now, our Far Left opponent -- the very one we defeated only weeks ago -- is gunning for a rematch.**

It's going to be the fight of our lives. The future of the House Majority hinges on whether or not we win because this seat -- _a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED_ \-- is a top-target. The Democrats have already spent millions against us and they're prepared to spend millions more to buy this seat out from under us.

_**[Can I count on you to chip in $7 right now to defend this seat from the Far Left?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-B6NbjUfd05eHTIl-h9GZ2gxS79Yg_crh_Zn-t3JEqmDPqAO_q9UQKHOwuCrYif1dawMz-3t5nntZ7x8Sb9OHRwjIh95_wbqeeeCItoq45DhTT04FN0-tc2vAfDLifSgtsOGP0z9UEvJGuTt4Runrv7REY42CVMLHWJgqb03HfDzUFYnit9Il5w7uTJZv8adbSSkYHgwYUYh52goXvwNvDusVT56se-QhwZz8PXf020Ls3lqo1E-oLGc2g7_Ob2SK4QRLpR7XTWLvypC8hVh39IxDcv826FLiNIFsbvwmtGzi_LbIAl4UVw7T_1uzVALADgBBno80xOsi35Ta0bekun3KLIeXjNG9IgGOm7ndw0NVcr_7swke-7ujMPhvFXUI1nNgI9yYe-P26SYYB8t7XntsqEF53LxlWFYADbI7suZGZP2Nfd--661CgVBDq8-&c=rFdcz_4JXC66tHpls7dCPfJ-2_4tSCfjP8CN49t21P5z8o75Fl0NLg==&ch=Q9sjN8EZUqTJHho6XMmVSEcp_adGP2RvojU8_NVWASJGWQB-NR4a2g==) **We need your help to fight against Pelosi's deep pockets and the Democrats' bottomless campaign war chests._

My accent is part of my story. I'm proud to be one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. It's time to make sure the American Dream is still achievable for all Americans.

Once again, we're facing one of the toughest, closest races in the nation, but with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, I know we can win again.

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

name: Kevin Hern
subject: I’m calling on the Supreme Court for election integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
I’m calling on the Supreme Court for election integrity
Dear Peter, Millions of Americans are left with questions after this election, and they are demand-ing answers. We must ensure that each and every precinct across the nation delivers accurate and transparent results.
There were a number of voter anomalies in the recent election. They may not prove to be fraudulent in the end, but Americans are upset and feel deceived. That’s why I just signed my name to an amicus brief for the Supreme Court for the Texas case. Texas filed suit with the Supreme Court in order to invalidate the electoral college votes from Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. These are “swing states” where election officials made changes this year outside of their authority and the states where Joe Biden won extraordinary amounts of last-minute votes. I have President Trump and America’s backs to fight for and defend fair elections. Free and fair elections are the bedrock of America, and I will always fight tooth and nail for voter integrity. **[Please help me protect fair elections by chipping in now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b4796210d450460c/7b0b54b762d9cb3cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** [**CHIP IN TO FUEL THE FIGHT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b4796210d450460c/5a717305e6c4e952c3d6b838967d376c/34143) **The radical left is pouring millions into the media to tell them to look away. If there is nothing to see, why don’t they want us to investigate? We must fight back!** Thank you for your support,
Kevin Hern [**CHIP IN TO FUEL THE FIGHT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b4796210d450460c/9d9f5957875b6371c3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-10-15-19:41:18:515t Paid For By Hern For Congress

Friend,
_ _
It’s Statehood Day in Indiana!

_Today, in 1816, President James Madison officially admitted Indiana into the United States of America — making Hoosier history and starting us on the incredible journey that got us to where we are today. _

[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ae38b378a8dd4927ab4813c872de0bb1&_e=1412Ug4pqGApZNl239TUoFWDAwCuk6rplrgtWoB-fL3-7bt_ASe6OM5NY0E0Boi9HLHCI6vKOIB39BFbI9vIhg1zWosVP5wBvh4sGMueuJy1_4KTfvYbf_E36D41x7MwAQ3SvHsiWkxq1DT_JBHYmlLZd1LIZUDvxb8P8WaG50mnlaPe8KMpKvNMYst1ImVoYo458OmUT1dSg8hXhIPbeMpjMXp40xxmDmY_vCBUbjfYMHfLKuOjvjXc6i1vT7jpdny4AOQ6p3m6d7TLkbaSgwW0bT9iSGPEEH8ZQdarN6qGTlphhoWJyxhOqQqtjxgrtZOYCE6dqsgFwzNqFnvljtEXLngAhxOmXXWJPLwY58RARdQPoIlIUkee7RRWSWmuuJ5ZU5WeU26mWHx9_y9VbPEWTbK6NGvQGGqAwi4n75QBn33MGIinqeHbqKjPRRCHW1VYvRU3gv_0iSmsJWbWnf4jVK3p-4mtJv-DJDMIosEhyN3TWWBJdy155MMYs3ZS)

**We’ve come a long way since then, and we’re proud of the progress we’ve made as a state. But we’re not done yet — we’re not even close. **

The next chapter in our state’s history has yet to be written, but we’re working hard to make it the best one yet.
[**Wish Indiana a Happy Birthday!**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ae38b378a8dd4927ab4813c872de0bb1&_e=1412Ug4pqGApZNl239TUoFWDAwCuk6rplrgtWoB-fL3-7bt_ASe6OM5NY0E0Boi9HLHCI6vKOIB39BFbI9vIhg1zWosVP5wBvh4sGMueuJy1_4KTfvYbf_E36D41x7MwAQ3SvHsiWkxq1DT_JBHYmlLZd1LIZUDvxb8P8WaG50mnlaPe8KMpKvNMYst1ImVoYo458OmUT1dSg8hXhIPbeMpjMXp40xxmDmY_vCBUbjfYMHfLKuOjvjXc6i1vT7jpdny4AOQ6p3m6d7TLkbaSgzePl3KyQPHwSiMWN_6qejAEMVXwlSWLl0mRJKFsd8LJV-D1ERRzdsoxk6DnSvIGU5eVXM1bFZjvkrwcvmRL327lLU47o8uszgU02FOXXAHoSBHibvBBea0QP5ufWKreWi-voSexci5nPEyhy0SkWMd5Vq38-kjvoTtYl_s97uuyUPRQPShFsqB2VHR9IucfHAKZ7sg3POuwqwWT91tmDngKxZM6trsMifLl_lhAUGT8)
That’s why Governor Holcomb laid out his ambitious agenda of building One Indiana for All, and that’s why it was endorsed resoundingly by Hoosiers at the ballot box on Election Day.

clean_body: Today, in 1816, President James Madison officially admitted Indiana into the United States of America — making Hoosier history and starting us on... | | | | ---|---|--- | Friend, It’s Statehood Day in Indiana! Today, in 1816, President James Madison officially admitted Indiana into the United States of America — making Hoosier history and starting us on the incredible journey that got us to where we are today. We’ve come a long way since then, and we’re proud of the progress we’ve made as a state. But we’re not done yet — we’re not even close. The next chapter in our state’s history has yet to be written, but we’re working hard to make it the best one yet. That’s why Governor Holcomb laid out his ambitious agenda of building One Indiana for All, and that’s why it was endorsed resoundingly by Hoosiers at the ballot box on Election Day. If you share our hope and optimism for the bright future of Indiana, please join us in wishing our state a happy 204th birthday below. Here’s to another 204 great years! Best, Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. name: Jay Inslee
subject: What happened in Spokane and how you can help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Everyone's okay, but the attack on their office is despicable.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8230%2E868730%2EKdVuTj) Friend, Today and every day, I stand with the Spokane Democrats -- but it really matters today. On Wednesday, a man entered the Spokane County Democrats HQ and threatened to bomb the building. Fortunately, the building was evacuated before anyone got hurt. But the man started a fire that has led to significant damage to the office. All across the country we've seen the terrible consequences of hateful and violent rhetoric. And unfortunately, more and more frequently we are seeing this rhetoric turn into actual violence. So while we're relieved that nobody was hurt in Spokane, the damage to property and the psychological toll are immense. **I want to be clear about this: Absolutely no one should be the target of violence for their beliefs. This is the culmination of years of a national narrative that has fueled the flames of hatred and divisiveness, and we cannot stand for it.** Every elected official everywhere should condemn this violence. Too many have faced threats of violence since Election Day, including leaders in Michigan and Georgia. We were warned last week that "someone's going to get killed" over this -- and this week proved again how real that possibility is. **Today, while we condemn the violence, we can also stand together to help in Spokane. The Spokane Democratic Party needs our help to get back to work. If you'd like to show your support for them in this time of rebuilding and healing,[please join me in making a donation to support their road to recovery.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14079?t=4&akid=8230%2E868730%2EKdVuTj)** In the meantime, keep speaking out against violence and in support of democracy. The election might be over, but the fight to keep each other and our country safe is far from finished. This week reminded me of that again -- and reminded me to hold my loved ones a little tighter in my heart. Very truly yours, Jay
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8230%2E868730%2EKdVuTj). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

| NH Accepts Record-Setting Federal Grant to Increase School Choice
---
---
| |
---
| Big news! This morning, after a nearly two year battle and under the new leadership of the Republican Majority, the Joint Legislative Fiscal Committee finally voted to accept the first round of a $46 million dollar Federal grant for expanding our state's public charter schools. With the pandemic forcing many New Hampshire schools to go to remote or hybrid models, encouraging innovation in our schools seems an easy choice. Yet, Democrats on the committee chose to play politics with this money for nearly two years. Accepting this grant is a huge win for New Hampshire families that want more input in how their children are educated and a huge win for educational choice. Our new Senate Republican Majority is already showing real results and there is much more to come in the new year! Thank you, NH Senate Republicans

Accepting this grant is a huge win for New Hampshire families that want more input in how their children are educated and a huge win for educational choice. Our new Senate Republican Majority is already showing real results and there is much more to come in the new year! Thank you, NH Senate Republicans | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03301 United States | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Vaccine science
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
At yesterday's press conference, we were joined by Dr. Philip Chan, an infectious disease specialist who has been a leader in the state's COVID-19 response. Dr. Chan provided a lot of information about the COVID-19 vaccine, including the standards of safety it must meet and the plans for distributing it to Rhode Islanders. Today, Dr. Chan hosted a Facebook Live to answer some common questions about the vaccine. You can watch that video by clicking below.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HD0x83rlJpqRjs-WMvbwWKH0Ywvp-BSvoU90MWKGxA5JAHHFTdUgjsqkH8xZJvgswWroeAZO9Ej-p6wzEWwQLxtULjaWLu1lxlSYndVySnsHpJA3sorPQPlyoFIp13LWI7StwUoDEYaukzEygZ7fHLDZPNwy1V-wiRU2f1dIyCO26GV64-UUnAXtpFdJ0BR8&c=4xb8vlQbfiXodctdAnv5pXN2QAsZnJ0_VzQhW6YVMHRb9QQuNBSfRg==&ch=OoSxpg7g9QVfwQ4fEH5nbB75M96043WjeLV55ZXcleFJgNAPCimPJw==)
---
| We've become familiar with words like social distancing and contact tracing over the past nine months - words that had previously been used only by medical experts. And one of the most critical parts of our early response was explaining those terms in a way that's easy to understand.
Dr. Chan does a great job of doing precisely that for vaccines: breaking down what they are, why and how they work, and what has gone into the preparation for the COVID-19 vaccine. I hope you'll take some time to watch and get caught up on why the COVID-19 vaccine is a turning point in our pandemic response.
Going forward, Dr. Chan will be hosting Facebook Live events like this regularly. Consider [following the Rhode Island Department of Health on Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HD0x83rlJpqRjs-WMvbwWKH0Ywvp-BSvoU90MWKGxA5JAHHFTdUgjsqkH8xZJvgsSJHqBcZQdPe0WQCxDz-qSKED4Voqan_EHkcQ-ihldjxHKoz20JdaoNIp8Ze4-TWSLr9axBNbIFEh2s9ssMS8FNii4q-CzYxS&c=4xb8vlQbfiXodctdAnv5pXN2QAsZnJ0_VzQhW6YVMHRb9QQuNBSfRg==&ch=OoSxpg7g9QVfwQ4fEH5nbB75M96043WjeLV55ZXcleFJgNAPCimPJw==) so that you can get the latest updates from them on the vaccine and more. Staying informed is the best way to protect your household during this challenging time.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HD0x83rlJpqRjs-WMvbwWKH0Ywvp-BSvoU90MWKGxA5JAHHFTdUgjsqkH8xZJvgsqdYpomq6J4_iJDq8XDi91Akk-lXQi7DFMlke-rQdslLc-AENy-yBr8dah_EjL1Ykb106FAz8Z4Fz0a1pldI8X1I_wNiQzkmYPPNa-CSRmC4aVmDb3sUevKD0cqSwrnAJqbwnA-YMEVJjvULqGF92dtjCKwVMaG7EAxUf3cr8K6Q6x1cBXoq8tN01X45PhWzAonAudo96tWoBhmxJhHDz74Wwjr8VBBj60WVN9WhAp0-ncw6u3KK7RaFWkbU_EttMQnARihCTcug=&c=4xb8vlQbfiXodctdAnv5pXN2QAsZnJ0_VzQhW6YVMHRb9QQuNBSfRg==&ch=OoSxpg7g9QVfwQ4fEH5nbB75M96043WjeLV55ZXcleFJgNAPCimPJw==).

body:
🏆 Setting you up for success in 2021
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter, what a year 2020 has been.

And now that we are all anxiously counting down the days until 2021, we wanted to share some important resources to help build on everything you learned and done this year.

Learn more about the 30-Day Challenge, our final Virtual Live Trainings of the year, and our latest blog posts below!

Onward,

– The NDTC Team
---
## 30 Day Challenge

Is running for office in your future? Still not sure if running is right for you? Sign up for our [30-Day Challenge](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZm1pcjJnYnIxbDI1emo2ZzEzaTQiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9uZHRjLTMwLWRheS1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmR0Y1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9) today and we’ll send you small, manageable tasks over the month of January to help you gauge whether running for office is for you, and to set up you for a successful campaign launch if you decide to take the plunge.
| [SIGN UP NOW](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZm1pcjJnYnIxbDI1emo2ZzEzaTQiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9uZHRjLTMwLWRheS1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmR0Y1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
---
## Blog Posts

[Running for Office with the National Democratic Training Committee](https://t.dripemail2.) by Dale Dorlin

Running for office is no small feat. It takes time, energy, and determination. The duty of a public servant is to represent and serve the people. But, before holding office, they have to run as a candidate... [CONTINUE READING](https://t.dripemail2.).

[Microaggressions and Stereotypes in the Virtual Workplace](https://t.dripemail2.) by Nifemi Akande

Microaggressions and stereotypes exist on and off the screen. We navigate communication online differently in comparison to in-person interactions. But, in this work-from-home environment, what is the best way... [CONTINUE READING](https://t.dripemail2.).
## Virtual Live Trainings Week of December 14

[How to Assess Your Organization's Capacity](https://t.dripemail2.)
Monday, December 14th at 1pm ET

Do you have BIG goals for your local organizations in 2021? We're here to help make sure you hit all of them. Join us on Monday for this training to walk through how you can map backward towards your organizational goals AND assess how capacity operates in your organization.
| [RSVP NOW](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
[Digital Organizing: How to Engage and Activate your Audience](https://t.dripemail2.)
Tuesday, December 15th at 1pm ET

Whether you're running for office, just won your race, or support your local organization on social media, this training is a must. You’ll learn the importance of having a sound digital content strategy, and practice mapping a week of your content calendar with what you just learned. This training will also cover how to continue engaging your audience through this pandemic.
| [RSVP NOW](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
|
---
| | | |
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Representative-elect Mann Announces Senior Staff Hires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/traceymann/update-9451204?e=a9d1410029)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE – December 11, 2020**
Contact: [Emily Woods](mailto:emily@traceymann.com?subject=Oct.%2012%20Press%20Conference) | (785) 236-7802
**Representative-elect Mann Announces Senior Staff Hires**
(Salina, Kansas) – Tracey Mann, Representative-elect for Kansas' 1st Congressional District, announces his senior staff. They will start in their official capacity on January 3, 2021.

Congressman-elect Mann expressed his excitement for the team, “We are working hard to assemble a top-tier team who will represent the values of the Big First. We are ready get to work and take some Kansas common sense to Washington.”

Chief of Staff: **Brandon Harder of Haven** , Kansas.

Brandon Harder has worked in and around the Kansas Congressional Delegation for over a decade. He served as Senator Jerry Moran’s Agriculture and Trade Advisor and then served Chairman Moran at the National Republican Senatorial Committee where he helped Republicans regain control of the U.S. Senate. Harder has spent the last six years representing agriculture, trade, and regulatory issues on Capitol Hill.

Harder is a native of the Big First where he grew up on a hay and cattle operation before attending Kansas State University where he earned a degree in Animal Science. He and his wife Kristina will split time between Washington D.C. and Kansas.

Harder said: “There has never been a more critical time to have strong representation in Washington, D.C. Congressman-elect Mann is bringing the leadership our country needs to the U.S. House. I am honored to join the team and excited to serve the Big First once again.”

District Director: **Reid Petty** of Liberal, Kansas.

Reid Petty's background includes working for Seward County Broadcasting, serving on the USD 480 Board of Education in Liberal, teaching, serving in the Kansas House of Representatives, working as the Legislative and Public Outreach Coordinator for the Kansas Department of Transportation in Topeka, and most recently working as U.S. Senator Jerry Moran's Southwest Kansas District Director in Garden City.

Petty attended the University of Kansas, and graduated with a bachelor’s degree in education from Oklahoma Panhandle State University. Petty is married to Hannah, and they have a one-year old son named Nicholas.

Petty said: "I am excited to join Congressman-elect Tracey Mann as his District Director. Congressman-elect Mann has a true passion to fight for Kansas values in Washington at a time that we most need it. I look forward to going to work every day to better the lives of all Kansans."
###
---

name: Team Kelly
subject: Another Huge Week for Georgia and Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Kelly had a jam-packed week fighting for Georgians and getting out the vote.
Today, she kicked off her Senate Firewall Statewide Tour in [Dawson](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V1f8SjEZwFux6o9BpoH0lpmjpXoOZ0kteJIRKs3gGYWpJyxQcGRdFg4aga9RtioXp3CpTCxM4JPA3pzee1rr2y373edFY02EczpsGJ9U-kwX71p9Bh0hDac6c121Ubh316whEmN5BetE9Q82iB99U_O5RUbD0eJfZNI9LayjNrmnfIYBoD8bsI9ajO508SfYgPiL-IT8ymc=&c=ezIuoIsjCFb2lLPGZJClT89iyHz4z91zMx9nTVylOYQ8Vcg3FO5Clg==&ch=BKV-M3Iph-EmjkV6IeIu-XseakVnZGa_fnSodS2nKomZo5PVp5W6YA==) and [Jackson](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V1f8SjEZwFux6o9BpoH0lpmjpXoOZ0kteJIRKs3gGYWpJyxQcGRdFg4aga9RtioX3CKFnsQpD2RcbGN8if5hLDQoNwwVF73rUWlAOn3C2uXrmzhXsHvYt9HQnayS9kPMiET8Ba7TReSS08PyCAXPZ-_EGwruqR5W6gKm9Bh7KC8R9Dh9sFIMRhoHKaFg8hGx0FZi-OKDglw=&c=ezIuoIsjCFb2lLPGZJClT89iyHz4z91zMx9nTVylOYQ8Vcg3FO5Clg==&ch=BKV-M3Iph-EmjkV6IeIu-XseakVnZGa_fnSodS2nKomZo5PVp5W6YA==) Counties, where she was joined by Representative-elect Andrew Clyde and Agriculture Commissioner Gary Black.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V1f8SjEZwFux6o9BpoH0lpmjpXoOZ0kteJIRKs3gGYWpJyxQcGRdFg4aga9RtioXp3CpTCxM4JPA3pzee1rr2y373edFY02EczpsGJ9U-kwX71p9Bh0hDac6c121Ubh316whEmN5BetE9Q82iB99U_O5RUbD0eJfZNI9LayjNrmnfIYBoD8bsI9ajO508SfYgPiL-IT8ymc=&c=ezIuoIsjCFb2lLPGZJClT89iyHz4z91zMx9nTVylOYQ8Vcg3FO5Clg==&ch=BKV-M3Iph-EmjkV6IeIu-XseakVnZGa_fnSodS2nKomZo5PVp5W6YA==)

including [calling](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V1f8SjEZwFux6o9BpoH0lpmjpXoOZ0kteJIRKs3gGYWpJyxQcGRdFlTFNVXBM18QjSI0FhjZWWbbZnvCa7W5KmsZCppkaFaItpuvNcZex1c9gQzFQ_2T2PsTGUOddBm2yU9tbUaChdk-qNlLcbO60eu7F6h0klwC4noEQtVvxkYp8kyJjVevUfFxe4RfmybzklyAcNnu6eCa3362xv5mQ7HEDZYTIN0aGF8JcbNP_ro=&c=ezIuoIsjCFb2lLPGZJClT89iyHz4z91zMx9nTVylOYQ8Vcg3FO5Clg==&ch=BKV-M3Iph-EmjkV6IeIu-XseakVnZGa_fnSodS2nKomZo5PVp5W6YA==) for the black middle class to pay more attention to the "hard questions about the distribution of wealth," [claiming](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V1f8SjEZwFux6o9BpoH0lpmjpXoOZ0kteJIRKs3gGYWpJyxQcGRdFlTFNVXBM18QxFY-kjuLvwp1V-rrmjaZLrwoMvXUA5Dff5IbkZwV4PYbRHBhRqKlcYDGS-n75RKPL7rlLGeaQyPmLoOrJ6vPD7TRmA2K1mfiN2pIEchYtmFzmwNMLzxsaCUBp_ga0Fb3esYE7XoLtR5oJBlN9k566ABw07sdgITJZESCbdlaLbg=&c=ezIuoIsjCFb2lLPGZJClT89iyHz4z91zMx9nTVylOYQ8Vcg3FO5Clg==&ch=BKV-M3Iph-EmjkV6IeIu-XseakVnZGa_fnSodS2nKomZo5PVp5W6YA==) the "Marxist critique has much to teach the black church," and [more](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V1f8SjEZwFux6o9BpoH0lpmjpXoOZ0kteJIRKs3gGYWpJyxQcGRdFg4aga9RtioXqQh2OMNrKYosox-Ml_TuLADwIGIES1noiVTx9jdYaFJgA9aFYGAZBPbqLXOaEFd4Dr0gDn4UgXMCA8ypdojGNpk72ImRe0Nnqwa4zfMR5ZE4ZYkAGVOotrWSkTuYpreR_ebD7Xtf1kcGBfHTlSI5M_26bbs1KEViIGrGtKojO2hULryENO4IMGwRzlgFl6Zg&c=ezIuoIsjCFb2lLPGZJClT89iyHz4z91zMx9nTVylOYQ8Vcg3FO5Clg==&ch=BKV-M3Iph-EmjkV6IeIu-XseakVnZGa_fnSodS2nKomZo5PVp5W6YA==).

Kelly and David joined Republicans in a federal lawsuit on Thursday to == the reliability of the signature verification process. name: Dick Durbin
subject: It all comes down to this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
The fight for control of the Senate is coming down to the wire, Peter.
On January 5, Georgia voters will decide whether the Senate remains in Republicans' hands -- or whether we send Jon Ossoff, Rev. Raphael Warnock, and a Democratic majority to D.C.
**[All eyes are on Georgia -- and after President-elect Joe Biden's win there, Democrats' chances are better than ever. Will you pitch in $5 to flip Georgia's Senate seats?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201208i_1127&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Peter, I am so grateful for supporters like you who have stood with me over the years. You are the reason our campaign in Illinois was so successful -- and this team was instrumental in taking back the White House from President Trump. That's why I am coming to you one more time for your help with these absolutely critical Senate runoff races in Georgia.
This is our opportunity to defeat Mitch McConnell and the GOP and turn a new page in the U.S. Senate. Can Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock count on your support at this crucial moment?
**[Rush in a $5 contribution right now to help flip Georgia -- and flip the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201208i_1127&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201208i_1127&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Covid-19 Vaccinations Could Start ‘Monday or Tuesday’ as FDA Set to Approve Pfizer Vaccine, HHS Chief Says; Morocco, Israel Normalize Ties... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c048c47971&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Covid-19 Vaccinations Could Start ‘Monday or Tuesday’ as FDA Set to Approve Pfizer Vaccine, HHS Chief Says**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42c83102bc&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Forbes_
“The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) is ‘rapidly’ proceeding toward authorizing Pfizer’s Covid-19 vaccine and vaccinations could begin by early next week,” Alison Durkee reports. “The FDA’s Vaccine and Related Biological Products Advisory Committee put the Pfizer-BioNTech vaccine on the track toward authorization Thursday, as it officially endorsed the Covid-19 vaccine as safe and effective.”

**MORE:**[**Operation Warp Speed shows America at its best**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b098c620b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Morocco, Israel Normalize Ties as US Recognizes Western Sahara**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=257fab524d&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Jerusalem Post_
“Israel and Morocco have agreed to establish diplomatic relations, US President Donald Trump announced on Thursday. Morocco became the fourth Arab country to normalize ties with Israel in four months,” Omri Nahmias, Lahav Harkov, and Greer Fay Cashman report. “White House Senior Adviser Jared Kushner said normalization ‘comes on the heels of four years of very, very hard work and very intense diplomacy.’”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Administration’s National Space Policy Formalizes Space Force Role**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5c01ee14aa&e=3ee4985eea)
-_SpaceNews_
“The Trump administration released a new national space policy Dec. 9 that articulates U.S. goals in civil space exploration, commercial growth and national security. The document recognizes the U.S. Space Force as the primary organization responsible for defending the nation’s interests in space,” Sandra Erwin writes.

**WATCH:**[**“America is leading in space once again,” Vice President says**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24d2f388ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Small Business Administrator Carranza: PPP Saved Millions of Small Businesses, American Jobs**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce7ed40923&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“During a year when every sector of society grappled with how to defeat a novel virus, COVID-19, and survive sweeping government shutdowns, we can say with certainty the American small business sector was upheld by the Trump administration,” SBA Administrator Jovita Carranza writes. More than 5 million U.S. businesses were buoyed by the Paycheck Protection Program, with 75% of loans going to the smallest firms.
---
|
---
| [**The Navy Stops Taking On Water**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ef33d5fc4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The Trump administration this week is taking an important step to quicken the U.S. Navy’s buildup after its disastrous decline under previous administrations,” White House Budget Director Russ Vought and National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien write. “Mr. Trump delivered on his promises to rebuild the military.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e77131b7a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8a32d758a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0d8fc551cc)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Indiana’s bright future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
This was another big week. You may have seen that I’ve started a new job in the private sector, but right off the bat I wanted to assure you of my... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/indianas-bright-future?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Indiana's Bright Future_** This was another big week. Just yesterday, we were excited to officially announce the inaugural class of the [Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=86fc863934&e=1acd9bb3d6)! I first told you about this program when we were launching back in July, with the aim of helping Hoosier Republicans from diverse backgrounds learn more about our party, government, and opportunities to get more involved. It’s part of our long-term efforts to bring more historically underrepresented communities into civic leadership roles in our state, and it’s something I’ve been talking about since becoming chairman.

I have to tell you, I’m really excited about this inaugural class. You can [check out their bios here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2ee6ebd4f0&e=1acd9bb3d6), and you’ll see that this class includes Hoosiers with backgrounds in the military, law enforcement, the ministry, business, tech, nonprofits, public service and beyond. With their experience and the connections and information they’ll gain through our class sessions starting in January, I know that this class (and our state) has a bright future ahead.

And speaking of our state’s bright future, happy 204th birthday to Indiana today. We’ve accomplished some great things together, and I know that our best days are still yet to come.
**PHOTO:** _I still smile when looking back at this photo of our Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series advisory council. They’re doing a great job helping guide this program, and I know they’ll provide great mentorship for our class._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Continuing to Build One Indiana For All_** It's been another busy week for **Governor Holcomb**!

On Tuesday, **Governor Holcomb** and the Indiana Department of Transportation announced that 241 Indiana cities, towns, and counties received a combined $101 million in state matching funds for local road projects through Community Crossings, a component of the Governor’s Next Level Roads program. For a full list of communities receiving matching funds in this latest round, click [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=41a789afd9&e=1acd9bb3d6).

During his weekly COVID-19 briefing on Wednesday, **Governor Holcomb** provided his own personal top 10 list of things we can all do to keep each other safe from COVID-19 in the coming months. Together, we can continue to fight the spread of COVID-19 in our state and enjoy a safe holiday season. Check out his list below:
1. Limit the size of your gatherings by following the metrics
2. Pause non-emergent procedures done in the in-patient hospital setting to free up hospital beds
3. Follow the mask mandate
4. Keep six feet between yourself and others; mask up when you're socially distanced and when you're not
5. Wash your hands throughout the day
6. Get tested if you're sick or symptomatic
7. Stay home and isolate if you test positive for COVID-19
8. Employers, talk to employees to help them understand how their activities outside of work affect the workplace and community
9. Give blood if you are able. Food pantries need help, too
10. Stay informed about the distribution of the vaccine in 2021

**Governor Holcomb** was also elected to join the Republican Governors Associations' executive committee in 2021, after serving last year as policy chairman.

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=faa681a1cc&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d332722875&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bc2ebbdf27&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| _**Introducing the 2021 Indiana Republican Diversity Series Class**_ The Indiana Republican Party today announced the members of its inaugural class of the [Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=122834db39&e=1acd9bb3d6), a seminar and leadership training program that will provide the preparation and resources needed to increase the engagement of minority Republican leaders in Indiana.

The class of 17 Hoosiers represents a wide range of backgrounds and communities across Indiana. Class members are from eight different counties. Their experience includes military, law enforcement, ministerial and public service; technology, entrepreneurial, nonprofit and government leadership; and beyond. [\--> Biographies for each member of the class are available ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=02fd8ad1c3&e=1acd9bb3d6)[here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87dd6d2aae&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a8866557b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Thank you, Congresswoman Brooks**_ On Tuesday,**Congresswoman Susan Brooks** delivered a farewell address to Congress from the floor of the U.S. House of Representatives. She reflects on her eight years of service in the 5th District, the work and results she’s been able to deliver to Hoosiers, and her view on steps Congress can take to restore public trust.

Watch the full speech or read the transcript [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3c946b1327&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| | _**House District 49 Caucus Set for Tuesday**_
Next Tuesday, the Indiana Republican Party will host a caucus of eligible precinct committee members to fill the upcoming vacancy in the office of House District 49. The Elkhart County Health Department approved the Indiana Republican Party's submitted plan to hold the caucus safely.

You can watch the caucus live on Tuesday at 6 p.m. ET on our [Facebook page](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=031e85567b&e=1acd9bb3d6).

_"Going into the 2021 session, it's critical that Hoosiers in Elkhart County have a strong voice in the legislature representing them. We're committed to holding this caucus to elect the next state representative for this district, and electing them safely."_ **– Chairman Hupfer**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Watch Chairman Hupfer this Weekend_**
This weekend, you can catch multiple interviews with **Chairman Hupfer** as he hits the airwaves to discuss Indiana Republicans' record year and the announcement of our inaugural class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series.
* Sunday, 106.7 WTLC & HOT 96.3, Indianapolis
Open Lines, 8 a.m. ET

* Sunday - WISH-TV, Indianapolis
All INdiana Politics, 9:30 a.m. ET

---
|
---
|
---
| _**Happy Hanukkah!**_
Happy Hanukkah, Hoosiers! As this Festival of Lights shines across Indiana and around the world, we're wishing Hoosiers a bright and meaningful holiday season during this time of miracles.
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Happy Birthday, Indiana!**_
Today in 1816, Indiana became our nation's 19th state. At 204 years old, Indiana has achieve a lot (thanks to Hoosiers!) -- but there's no doubt that our brightest days are still to come.

Join us in wishing the best state in the nation, Indiana, a happy birthday!
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[awards $101 million in Community Crossings](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1fc0cda9e1&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ grants with INDOT](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b692415e90&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[joins True Rx Health Strategists for groundbreaking ceremony](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7717554219&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young**[introduces the bipartisan Hydrogen Utilization and Sustainability Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0767d09d6d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[goes on ABC's This Week to talk about the election](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3f925a9439&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[passes bill to simplify Medicare enrollment](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=90ac90138d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[b](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0f676a9307&e=1acd9bb3d6)[elieves teachers should be prioritized for COVID-19 vaccine](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0fe9711bfe&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [speaks on behalf of the residents from Lake Freeman and Lake Shafer](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c43a0df722&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks **[delivers a reflective farewell address to Congress](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=edf1225c82&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence**[announces $169 million in rural broadband funding](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bdb20a12cd&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ for Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d31aa575a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[affirms renaming of Indiana post office after WWII Hoosier hero](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2e51fb662d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** [t](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3c9da4c2e7&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ _alks with Greater Bloomington Chamber of Commerce_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=178e3273a3&e=1acd9bb3d6)

I have to tell you, I’m really excited about this inaugural class. You can , and you’ll see that this class includes Hoosiers with backgrounds in the military, law enforcement, the ministry, business, tech, nonprofits, public service and beyond. With their experience and the connections and information they’ll gain through our class sessions starting in January, I know that this class (and our state) has a bright future ahead. And speaking of our state’s bright future, happy 204th birthday to Indiana today. We’ve accomplished some great things together, and I know that our best days are still yet to come. PHOTO: I still smile when looking back at this photo of our Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series advisory council. They’re doing a great job helping guide this program, and I know they’ll provide great mentorship for our class. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Continuing to Build One Indiana For All It's been another busy week for Governor Holcomb! On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb and the Indiana Department of Transportation announced that 241 Indiana cities, towns, and counties received a combined $101 million in state matching funds for local road projects through Community Crossings, a component of the Governor’s Next Level Roads program. For a full list of communities receiving matching funds in this latest round, click . During his weekly COVID-19 briefing on Wednesday, Governor Holcomb provided his own personal top 10 list of things we can all do to keep each other safe from COVID-19 in the coming months. Together, we can continue to fight the spread of COVID-19 in our state and enjoy a safe holiday season. Check out his list below: 1. Limit the size of your gatherings by following the metrics 2. Pause non-emergent procedures done in the in-patient hospital setting to free up hospital beds 3. Follow the mask mandate 4. Keep six feet between yourself and others; mask up when you're socially distanced and when you're not 5. Wash your hands throughout the day 6. Get tested if you're sick or symptomatic 7. Stay home and isolate if you test positive for COVID-19 8. Employers, talk to employees to help them understand how their activities outside of work affect the workplace and community 9. Give blood if you are able. Food pantries need help, too 10. Stay informed about the distribution of the vaccine in 2021 Governor Holcomb was also elected to join the Republican Governors Associations' executive committee in 2021, after serving last year as policy chairman. To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , and ! | | Introducing the 2021 Indiana Republican Diversity Series Class The Indiana Republican Party today announced the members of its inaugural class of the , a seminar and leadership training program that will provide the preparation and resources needed to increase the engagement of minority Republican leaders in Indiana. The class of 17 Hoosiers represents a wide range of backgrounds and communities across Indiana. Class members are from eight different counties. Their experience includes military, law enforcement, ministerial and public service; technology, entrepreneurial, nonprofit and government leadership; and beyond. | | | Thank you, Congresswoman Brooks On Tuesday,Congresswoman Susan Brooks delivered a farewell address to Congress from the floor of the U.S. House of Representatives. She reflects on her eight years of service in the 5th District, the work and results she’s been able to deliver to Hoosiers, and her view on steps Congress can take to restore public trust. Watch the full speech or read the transcript . | | | House District 49 Caucus Set for Tuesday Next Tuesday, the Indiana Republican Party will host a caucus of eligible precinct committee members to fill the upcoming vacancy in the office of House District 49. The Elkhart County Health Department approved the Indiana Republican Party's submitted plan to hold the caucus safely. You can watch the caucus live on Tuesday at 6 p.m. ET on our . "Going into the 2021 session, it's critical that Hoosiers in Elkhart County have a strong voice in the legislature representing them. We're committed to holding this caucus to elect the next state representative for this district, and electing them safely." – Chairman Hupfer | | | Watch Chairman Hupfer this Weekend This weekend, you can catch multiple interviews with Chairman Hupfer as he hits the airwaves to discuss Indiana Republicans' record year and the announcement of our inaugural class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. Sunday, 106.7 WTLC & HOT 96.3, Indianapolis Open Lines, 8 a.m. ET Sunday - WISH-TV, Indianapolis All INdiana Politics, 9:30 a.m. ET | | | Happy Hanukkah! Happy Hanukkah, Hoosiers! As this Festival of Lights shines across Indiana and around the world, we're wishing Hoosiers a bright and meaningful holiday season during this time of miracles. | | | Happy Birthday, Indiana! Today in 1816, Indiana became our nation's 19th state. At 204 years old, Indiana has achieve a lot (thanks to Hoosiers!) -- but there's no doubt that our brightest days are still to come. Join us in wishing the best state in the nation, Indiana, a happy birthday! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New OpEd: "There’s More to Politics Than Policy."
body:
[ ](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=d1c472a8ca434724887953ba1eccaab4&_e=L-MFkCX0VMia5OY0Uh39H94mrnJwaCinfS6H6R1AdyjN92jhKAHtyFiMB5gRnXSD3Zt24cWPcnd46yJOF9n_45yA3CFC5ID3bLwI9t8xl_n2N-GpZsl4EMzD0JQaD3R7XJ5FA9fNCKklkNYNsXZb39RzGrq8Y-pMFKbUnTWQxy48y7gWGaK572cYRRXyEVashSVanEusQS6q6xaTjgON2QSWyFsWTpcDRNYe3dS11BKPHahEECNwabj15nnjkMqObWbjy0qhztzlY8MGSjse2w%3D%3D) I hope you get a chance to read my latest article in the Wall Street Journal, "[There’s More to Politics Than Policy.](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=d1c472a8ca434724887953ba1eccaab4&_e=L-MFkCX0VMia5OY0Uh39H1zvue0WOmvYdyD0ZeU8JpPY_JfCBHYlYW4L0aIpx7D6GXuBWhrzlfX7Ouc32WXC_HAXSbjy6obY2m3IYgHpYJ1WXEQ7y9Hdr69LrIMEaWwDLL9AveMaQuE43YpDwr2952WNn5l9nl72u05ySnwMFdCd6rZWaiyhJm1qhkfMud7aW4xtheL9fpeS_FmYWkI4z_V56aYmhPufc43aFZnJqQTYDgtqvNqwKLSWGt4UbbOguOPGJjl1KzjuXXrjKSdqm9ur3o17pcOR8Oi8y7MqP83hY7x7m0bgY-jzU-38wdqh3tI75zEp5PnzR3jI7e-nFw%3D%3D)" We don’t make the big decisions in our lives with a calculator: whom we love, whom we marry, the children we bring into the world, the groups to which we are loyal, the causes for which we fight and die. We make those commitments not only with our heads, but also with our hearts. A young soldier will jump on a grenade and extinguish his own life to save his buddies. It isn’t a rational act. It is a noble act of the spirit and heart, the kind of sacrifice that is essential to the success of the larger society. Sincerely, Bobby Jindal [CLICK HERE TO READ FULL ARTICLE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=d1c472a8ca434724887953ba1eccaab4&_e=L-MFkCX0VMia5OY0Uh39H1zvue0WOmvYdyD0ZeU8JpPY_JfCBHYlYW4L0aIpx7D6GXuBWhrzlfX7Ouc32WXC_HAXSbjy6obY2m3IYgHpYJ1WXEQ7y9Hdr69LrIMEaWwDjydbvoVerCVM6JRHAz2mM4K2lw_OVLOKCQlBEntpQeDDw-lHNewY_fzXik0hx47LSgg6QpmymMFSAyINSsS_rdaIrOoKijhBI_TsrsZQUKQasSjVFoMjkFnbFhMZmN5Q3zduskZd4MLIi9oFLIwU10gNwPoQmVJx0HozPd0-KP7LHnDWLu-BZJRs8QSZdpPqpuoi_8yGYYMaM90QK-3_Ng%3D%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://links.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=d1c472a8ca434724887953ba1eccaab4&_t=lSzks4UfrrGTvGC2FZR9fttjPmwO3MlRoWkIN2NYvNJW3pVGwmAqGGufXG6KwWBgBIXT-psHO4f92IumGQgJ5SZNSehP0LGxjB5ZtLe82ErRG9erJTd6Rha-8-FW6VBU2FisF04f-8rndrGKwUWQtUenhn6u4JQICvEkh6M8yjM%3D)

We make those commitments not only with our heads, but also with our hearts. A young soldier will jump on a grenade and extinguish his own life to save his buddies. It isn’t a rational act.
