name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Biden Admits Ossoff’s Position On Defunding The Police Could Cost Him The Election
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5eee3535110c/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66859?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| Hey there, Joe Biden and the Democrats are scrambling to hide their **extreme, dangerous agenda** in fear of losing voters in the two senate runoff races. But unfortunately for them, that ship has sailed. The _New York Times_ reported this morning that Joe Biden participated in a private phone call with civil rights leaders in which he warned that vocalizing support for defunding the police could cost the Democrats the two Senate seats up for grabs in Georgia. Biden’s advice is too little too late for radical liberal Jon Ossoff, who has already said that funding for police departments needs to be “[on the line](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3efe524132&e=02cd889ad3).” As Biden said in the _[New York Times](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1edd665e48&e=02cd889ad3)_ ’ story:
* _“I also don’t think we should get too far ahead of ourselves on dealing with police reform in that, because they’ve already labeled us as being ‘defund the police’...Anything we put forward in terms of the organizational structure to change policing — which I promise you, will occur. Promise you. Just think to yourself and give me advice whether we should do that before Jan. 5.” _

Not only has Jon Ossoff backed the "defund the police" movement, but he has fully embraced the support of a number of radical individuals and groups who want to join him in that effort.
* **[Ossoff has praised](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6999630a27&e=02cd889ad3)** **Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, who has said “defunding the police means defunding the police.” **
* **Anti-police BLM PAC is[ bankrolling](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b0200b0a1f&e=02cd889ad3) Ossoff and his radical running mate, Raphael Warnock. **
* **One of Ossoff’s top supporters, DeKalb County commissioner Ted Terry,[ supports](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b4f67e040c&e=02cd889ad3) dismantling law enforcement organizations.**

We already know full well that _Jon Ossoff would help his radical liberal supporters defund the police_ , and we won’t be fooled by Joe Biden’s weak attempt to bury the far-left agenda the Democrats would enact if given the chance. No matter how hard they try to cover it up during the next 25 days, we must hold the Ossoff-Biden Democrats accountable for their dangerous plans to eliminate our law enforcement. Georgians know that **Senator Perdue is the only candidate in this race who will keep them and their families safe and stand with our brave women and men in blue.** Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=63fd1c83ea&e=02cd889ad3) for more from _Townhall_ about how Biden’s comments “put an even bigger spotlight” on Ossoff’s anti-law enforcement record.
---
| Thank you for helping us hold the line.

**\- Team Perdue**

---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: quick thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there, this will be quick -- and I really need your help:
1\. We just made the runoff in the Georgia special election that could decide Senate control.

2\. My Republican opponent is spending over $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to defeat me and buy this seat for Mitch McConnell.

3\. Our grassroots campaign is **falling $7,027 short** of what we need to fight back, keep our TV ad on the air and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, our ad could go dark -- and we'd cede the airwaves to my far-right opponent right as the critical runoff begins.**
We cannot give McConnell and the GOP another two years in power -- but according to analysts at The Washington Post, that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground Senate race.
Please, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our MUST-HIT deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now:
[**Will you give $3 before 11:59 p.m. tonight to keep our ads on the air, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7ac/2a380d31/21e6ddde/f05800/2019827103/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTIxMV9td2g0cndfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201211_mwh4rw_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: This is about you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
Senator Rosen said I could reach out about the Senate runoff election.
I can't emphasize enough how critical this race is to not only Georgians, but the American people. Control of the U.S. Senate and the state of our democracy are on the line in January.
I received **_more votes_ **than any other Georgia Democrat in state history during the November election and I can do it again, but only with grassroots supporters like you behind me to power us through to a victory.
****[This is our last chance to win a Democratic Senate majority. Will you continue your support? Split a $5 donation between our fight in Georgia and Jacky Rosen now.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201124-georgia?refcode=em201211i_4740&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
My opponent, David Perdue, is Donald Trump's "favorite Senator" and has voted _**four times**_ to end protections for people with pre-existing health conditions. What does that say about his politics?
Neither Perdue nor the rest of the Republican Party have offered substantial steps to improve this country -- they have said _**NO**_ to critical financial relief to working families and small businesses struggling during this pandemic.
This is the last kind of leadership we need, especially in the midst of a public health and economic disaster. It's time to focus on what **_you_** need from this country -- I won't stop fighting because these issues are worth it.
* Ensuring affordable health care for Georgians and all Americans
* Passing a new Voting Rights Act
* Investing in clean energy and infrastructure
* Putting the interests of families and small businesses ahead of Wall Street
* Rooting out government corruption

****[I'm going to leave it all on the field in January. Are you with me? Split a $5 donation to help fuel our fight in Georgia and support Jacky Rosen in Nevada.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201124-georgia?refcode=em201211i_4740&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
We can and we will build a stronger, more just, more prosperous America.
Let's go win this thing,
Jon Ossoff
** **
** **
******[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201124-georgia?refcode=em201211i_4740&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")******

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dbf8a/4fbb2af3/20416fcb/5e8182c4/3785680133/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126

clean_body: Two important runoff races in Georgia will decide the control of the U.S. Senate for the next two years, and it’s important that we support Rev. Rapha | | | Two important runoff races in Georgia will decide the control of the U.S. Senate for the next two years, and it’s important that we support Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff so that we have a co-governing body we can work with to pass legislation for the American people. Affordable health care, stopping the spread of COVID-19, providing relief for our families and small businesses, cleaning up Washington and combating climate change -- the amount of progress we can make on all of these issues will be decided by what happens in Georgia.
